```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement infrastructure drift detection"
---
# Infrastructure Drift
## Task
Detect and correct infrastructure drift.
## Requirements
1. Compare actual state vs desired state. 2. Alert on detected drift.
3. Auto-correct drift or create remediation ticket. 4. Track drift frequency.
5. Identify root causes of recurring drift.
## Constraints
- Check drift daily. Auto-correct for non-critical resources. Manual review for critical.
## Success Criteria
- Drift detected within 24h. Auto-corrected or ticketed. Root causes tracked.
```
